digest.component_or_area: plan-review kernel Pass-2 verification contract and Pass-3 deterministic decide
propositions: A blocking finding with a false absence premise survived Pass-2 and blocked even though a sibling advisory in the same verdict quoted the provision claimed missing.
Pass-2 gains two abstain-safe binaries, claims_absence and absence_confirmed_in_context, added to the shared verification contract without changing older verifiers.
Pass-3 adds a deterministic veto symmetric to the cited-reference veto: drop a finding when claims_absence=yes and absence_confirmed_in_context=no.
A DET-tier hygiene backstop drops subject-less DET findings at the emission/aggregation point without touching LLM-tier findings; audit confirms P5 task-dag already names subjects.

The [operator-attested] AC tag is DET-detected and injected into severity_attributes, clearing the ac_unverifiable hard-override contribution before impact_plan reads it while keeping kernel math byte-unchanged.
E2/F1/E6 rubrics and one new coach MOVE_REGISTRY entry gain ADR-0043 attestation vocabulary, with comment-trail consultation an explicit non-goal.
